In compliance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI LODA Regulations, we would like to inform you 
that a meeting of the Board of Directors of lnterGlobe Aviation limited ("Company") is 
scheduled to be held on Thursday, October 28, 2021, inter-alia, to consider and approve 
the unaudited standalone and consolidated financial results ("Financial Results") of the 
CompanliJ for the quarter and half year ended on September 30, 2021, subject to a limited 
review by the Statutory Auditors.

lnterGlobe Aviation limited - Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Trading by 
Designated Persons, we herebliJ inform you that the trading window for trading in securities 
of the Company by the Designated Persons was closed with effect from September 23, 2021.

lnterGlobe Aviation limited ("lndlGo") to Announce Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2022 Results on 
October 28, 2021 
Gurgaon, October 21, 2021: lndiGo will be announcing its Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2022 results 
on October 28, 2021 . 
The company will conduct a 60 minutes conference coll at 17:00 hours 1ST on October 28. 2021 
(open to investors/ anah,ists in all regions), where senior management will discuss the Company's
